hooks.command: command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude' 'Task finished!' --icon=dialog-information; { command -v paplay >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/complete.oga ] && paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/complete.oga; } 2>/dev/null; true
command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude' 'Prompt waiting for your input!' --icon=dialog-information; true

command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude' 'Permission requested' --icon=dialog-question; { command -v paplay >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/window-question.oga ] && paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/window-question.oga; } 2>/dev/null; true
